# uapi_dhcp_leases (Data Source)

The current active DHCP leases (IPv4) reported by the router at runtime.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uapi_dhcp_leases" "current" {}

output "active_leases" {
  value = data.uapi_dhcp_leases.current.leases
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `leases` (Attributes List) Active DHCP leases. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--leases))

<a id="nestedatt--leases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `leases`

Read-Only:

- `duid` (String) Client DUID, if known.
- `expires_at` (Number) Unix epoch seconds when the lease expires.
- `hostname` (String) Client hostname, if known.
- `ip` (String) Assigned IP address.
- `mac` (String) Client MAC address.
